<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band11_chunk003.pdf#page=1 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band11 p100 -->

<!-- header: LANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN · KLOSTERSFFON -->

<!-- header: LANDKREIS TRAUNSTEIN · KLOSTERSEEON -->


[[File:Band11_chunk003_p001_img001.jpg|thumb|W, Tod des hl. Joseph]]



[[File:Band11_chunk003_p001_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band11 p101 -->
